name: Concrete Column Calculator
seo_description: Pouring concrete columns? Enter width, depth, height and quantity to get total volume, cement bags and formwork area for your structural pillars.
example_label: Calculatete materials for a concrete column 0.40m x 0.40m, 3m high with 100 kg/m³ steel density.
result_context: The column requires {volumen} m³ of concrete, {cement_sacos} bags of cement, {sand_m3} m³ of sand, {gravel_m3} m³ of gravel and {acero_kg} kg of steel reinforcement.
formula_display: Volume = Section Area x Height; Steel = Volume x kg/m³
mistakes: Not Consider The length of solape of The barras verticales in empalmes
Use estribos with separación excesiva (deberían ir more juntos in extremos)
Omitir recubrimiento minimum of 3cm to proteger The steel
description: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete columns.
desc: Calculate materials for reinforced concrete columns.
